course_title: EXPERIMENTAL DESIGN AND ANALYSIS IN BIOTECHNOLOGY
description: Principles of descriptive and inferential statistics with applications in biotechnology including experimental design, quantitative data analysis, and bioinformatic evaluation of complex molecular and biological data sets.

optimized_prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Declared in MS Applied Biotechnology or Capstone Certificate in Applied Bioinformatics

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Declared in MS Applied Biotechnology or Capstone Certificate in Applied Bioinformatics
